phrases: My teacher is very kind and helpful.

Our house is big and very comfortable.
The sky is blue and very clear today.
I like to look at the sky in the evening.
Hello, how are you today?
I say hello to my friends at school.
The kitten is very small and cute.
I have a little kitten at home.
The dog is brown and very friendly.
I like brown shoes and jackets.
It is sunny today, so we go outside.
The weather is sunny and warm.
This is a bad idea for the game.
I feel bad because I am tired today.
The butterfly is flying in the garden.
I see a beautiful butterfly near the flowers.
The dog is running in the park.
I have a friendly dog at home.
Birds can fly very high in the sky.
I want to fly a kite in the park.

My cat likes to play with a ball.

This pencil is new and very sharp.
My phone is on the table in my room.
I use my phone to call my friends.

The paper is on my desk in the classroom.

Birds are sitting in the tree outside.
This is my room and I like it.
The room is clean and bright.
The door is open in my room.
Please close the door quietly.

I sit on the floor and play games.
My grandfather is very old and kind.
This is an old book from the library.
The young boy is playing in the yard.
She is very young but very smart.
I am happy today at school.
I like to play football with my friends.
You are my best friend.
I see you at school every day.
He is my brother and he is funny.
He plays football after school.

She is very kind and helpful.
We are in the same school class.
We play together in the park.
I eat an apple every morning.
We eat dinner with our family.
I drink water after running.
She drinks milk every morning.
I run in the park every evening.
They run very fast in the game.
I walk to school with my friend.
We walk in the park after dinner.
I can jump very high on the playground.
The cat can jump onto the table.
I swim in the pool every Saturday.

I sleep at night for many hours.
The baby sleeps in a small bed.
I read a book before bedtime.
We read stories in the classroom.
I write my homework in a notebook.
She writes a letter to her friend.
I speak English at school every day.
They speak slowly so I can understand.

We watch TV after dinner.

They play games in the park.

She draws a cat in her notebook.
I dance at school parties.
They dance together in the classroom.
I am hungry after school.
She is hungry and wants a sandwich.

This car is very fast on the road.
The turtle moves very slow.
He walks slow in the morning.
I have a new school bag.
This is a new toy from my friend.
I have one apple in my bag.
One dog is playing in the yard.
I have two pencils in my hand.
Two birds are flying in the sky.
I see three cats near the house.
Three children are playing outside.
I have four pencils in my pencil case at school.
There are four chairs around the table in my room.
I can count five fingers on one hand.
There are five apples in the basket on the table.
My alarm clock rings at six in the morning.
There are six students in our small group today.
I wake up at seven and get ready for school.
There are seven days in one week.
There are eight planets in our solar system that we study.
I go to bed at eight o’clock in the evening.
I finish my homework at nine in the evening.
There are nine players in a baseball team.
I can count to ten without making mistakes.
There are ten fingers on both of my hands.
On Monday I go back to school after the weekend.
We usually have English class on Monday morning.
On Tuesday I have football practice after school.
We study math and science on Tuesday at school.
Wednesday is the middle of the school week for me.
On Wednesday I read a new story in class.
On Thursday we usually have a test at school.
I meet my friends after school on Thursday.
Friday is my favorite day because the weekend starts.
On Friday we finish school earlier than usual.
On Saturday I play games and relax at home.
We go shopping with my family on Saturday morning.
On Sunday I usually visit my grandparents.
Sunday is a quiet day when I rest and prepare for school.
January is very cold and often snowy in my country.
In January we start a new year at school.
February is a short month with only twenty-eight or twenty-nine days.
In February the weather is still cold and windy.
In March the snow starts to melt and spring begins.
March is the time when days become longer.
In April the trees start to become green again.
April often has rainy days and fresh air.
In May the weather is warm and flowers are everywhere.
We often go outside more in May after school.
In June the school year usually ends and summer begins.
June is a warm month with long sunny days.
In July I usually go on summer vacation with my family.
July is one of the hottest months of the year.
In August I still enjoy summer before school starts again.
August is warm and perfect for outdoor games.
In September school starts again after the summer break.
September is the beginning of autumn.
In October the leaves change color and fall from the trees.
October is usually cool and a little windy.
In November the weather becomes cold and gray.
November is the time when we wear warm jackets.
In December we celebrate holidays and the New Year.
December is cold and often snowy outside.
In spring the flowers start to bloom in the garden.

Summer is warm and the days are very long.
In autumn the leaves fall from the trees and turn yellow.
Autumn is cool and sometimes rainy weather.
In winter it often snows and everything is white.
Winter is cold and I wear warm clothes.

I feel better today after I rested yesterday.
This game is better than the one we played before.
This is the best day of my summer holiday.

I tried to catch the fly but it was too fast.

The food at school lunch is usually warm and tasty.

I like to look at the moon before I go to sleep.

The apple is red and very sweet.

The flower smells very nice in the spring.

I feel happy when I play with my friends after school.

I feel sad when my friends are not at school.
My shoes are dirty after playing football in the park.

I like to keep my hands clean before eating.
That movie was very funny and made me laugh a lot.
My friend tells a funny story at school.
The teacher looked serious during the test.
He is serious when he talks about his homework.
I like apples and bananas for breakfast.
My brother and I go to school together.
I want to play outside, but it is raining.
She is tired, but she still finishes her homework.
Do you want tea or juice for breakfast?
We can play football or basketball after school.

I saw a bat in a nature documentary on TV.
A rat ran quickly across the street at night.
The rat was looking for food near the wall.

I saw a cute puppy in the pet shop window.
The tiger is walking slowly in the zoo.
I watched a video where a tiger hunts in the forest.

I saw a lion sleeping under a tree at the zoo.

We turned on the lamp because it was dark in the room.
The clock on the wall shows that it is already eight o’clock.
I always check the clock before I leave for school.
My watch helps me know the time during school.

We eat dinner together at the table every evening.
My books are on the table in my room.
I sit on the chair when I do my homework.

I go to bed at nine o’clock every night.
My bed is very comfortable and warm.
The sun is shining brightly in the sky today.
I like to play outside when the sun is warm.
I take an umbrella when it rains outside.

It is snowy outside and everything is white.

I like to stay inside when it rains outside.
I wash my face every morning and evening.
